diagnosis_text: This is a nested-group inheritance issue. You checked data-team, which does hold the grant on 'Q3 Revenue Models' — but Maya isn't a direct member of data-team. She's a member of data-team-ml, which is nested under data-team. By default, access grants on a parent group don't propagate down to nested subgroups. The fix is either to grant access directly on data-team-ml, or to move Maya into data-team as a direct member.
